title: Eggplant with Tunisian Peas in Chinese Style
description: A fusion dish that combines the flavors of Tunisia with Chinese cooking techniques. This eggplant recipe is a unique twist on traditional Chinese cuisine.

ingredients.name: dreamy
ingredients.notes: Dreamy is assumed to be a type of sauce or ingredient, please replace with actual ingredient if needed

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the eggplant and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the tunisian peas and cook until tender, about 3 minutes.
Add the dreamy sauce and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
